title: Romantic Handmade Purple Crystal Rose Bouquet with Vase for Her Romantic Flower Gift for Wife Girlfriend Mum Floral Ornament for Valentine's Day Mother's Day Birthday Anniversary
features: Crystal Rose Gifts - The delicate crystal purple rose figurine symbolizes passion, romance, and heartfelt gratitude. It is an ideal gift for mums, wives, girlfriends, daughters, friends, or colleagues. On special occasions such as Valentine's Day, anniversaries, birthdays, Mother's Day, weddings, engagements, Christmas, or Thanksgiving, it conveys appreciation, care, and best wishes

Craftsman Design - This collectible crystal rose statue features three purple crystal roses, three green crystal leaves, and elegant crystal stems. Each delicate petal, leaf, and stem is meticulously crafted by skilled artisans, ensuring exceptional clarity, brilliance, and lasting beauty that never fades. The multi-faceted, diamond-cut crystal base enhances its radiance, capturing and reflecting rainbow light. Size: 4.6*10*5.7cm/1.8*3.94*2.25"

Crystal Rose Flower Figurines - This purple rose crystal ornament symbolizes eternal love and blessings, making it a perfect expression of your feelings for the most cherished person in your life. The meticulous craftsmanship, combined with clean and impurity-free crystal materials, results in a timeless and radiant work of art

Elegant Ornaments - This crystal rose gift can effortlessly serve as a home decoration. It can be placed on tables, bookshelves, in living rooms, bedrooms, mantelpieces, and other places. The lifelike glass roses and leaves refract light into brilliant rainbow light, casting a charming glow in your room and creating a romantic and harmonious atmosphere
Gift-Ready - Our purple glass rose figurine is packaged in a gift box, accompanied by a blank gift card and a soft cleaning cloth, being ready to surprise and love her at any time
description: This collectible crystal rose statue features three vibrant purple roses and three green leaves with elegant stems, all crafted from K9 crystal This lifelike crystal rose can be placed on a table, bookshelf, living room or bedroom, and reflects the beauty of light, creating a romantic atmosphere Materials: K9 crystal Package Include: 1 x Crystal rose flower 1 x Gift box 1 x Gift card 1 x Wiping cloth
